name: Ae Game Golf
about: Ae Game Golf is Massachusetts' most advanced indoor training facility, combining TrackMan simulators, PGA-certified coaches, and a premium environment to help golfers of all levels improve year-round. The venue offers private bays equipped with TrackMan 4 technology, expert coaching sessions, and specialized putting facilities, all designed to provide a professional-grade experience for practice and skill development. Membership options and various lesson packages are available to accommodate both casual players and dedicated golfers seeking to elevate their game.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to TrackMan 4 technology for precise swing and ball flight analysis
Year-round indoor practice in a premium, professional environment
PGA-certified coaching and personalized lesson plans
Specialized putting studio with SAM PuttLab technology

food_and_drink.notes: No food service mentioned on the website
No alcohol service mentioned on the website

simulator_hardware.notes: TrackMan 4 simulators for full swing analysis

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you will need to bring your own golf clubs to use the simulators and practice facilities.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No outside food or drinks are mentioned as being allowed. The website does not list any food or drink service options.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not specify the time required for a full 18-hole simulation.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Ae Game Golf offers junior lessons and coaching programs, indicating a kid-friendly environment for young golfers to learn and practice.
